comment: Golden canonicalization vector for `inputs_resolved_sha256` (spec §3.3, §8.3). The canonicalization rule is RFC 8785 (JSON Canonicalization Scheme — JCS): UTF-8, NFC-normalized strings, lexicographic key ordering, no insignificant whitespace, JS Number.toString() for floats. An implementation that does not produce the listed `expected_canonical_bytes` and `expected_sha256` for the listed `input` is broken — fix the implementation, never the vector.

notes: `mount_height_m_agl: 12.0` canonicalizes to the integer-form `12` per RFC 8785 §3.2.2.3 (trailing-zero floats serialize without decimals).
Object keys are sorted lexicographically at every nesting depth.
`expected_sha256` is a placeholder — when the first conformant implementation lands, compute the SHA-256 of the UTF-8 bytes above and replace this string. Subsequent implementations must match.
